TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1980 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Bhutan anini i ci Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, patirengan a romi'ad i 2006 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 14 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *i*m…ô kńß…ôsar nam*j…ô…ĺ waŇč ¶ńßo~u~u ¶k , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vńßo~u~utan anini i ¶i *i*m…ô kńß…ôsar nam*j…ô…ĺ waŇč ¶ńßo~u~u ¶k, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1980 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Bhutan anini i ci Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, patirengan a romi'ad i 2006 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 14 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *i*m…ô kńß…ôsar nam*j…ô…ĺ waŇč ¶ńßo~u~u ¶k , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vńßo~u~utan anini i ¶i *i*m…ô kńß…ôsar nam*j…ô…ĺ waŇč ¶ńßo~u~u ¶k, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
